cm:entries:migrate-html-rte.description: Migration script to migrate content from HTML RTE to JSON RTE
examples: csdx cm:entries:migrate-html-rte --alias alias --content-type content_type_uid --html-path html-path --json-path json-path
csdx cm:entries:migrate-html-rte --alias alias --content-type content_type_uid --html-path modular_block_uid.block_uid.html_rte_uid --json-path modular_block_uid.block_uid.json_rte_uid
csdx cm:entries:migrate-html-rte --alias alias --content-type content_type_uid --html-path group_uid.html_rte_uid --json-path group_uid.json_rte_uid
csdx cm:entries:migrate-html-rte --alias alias --content-type global_field_uid --global-field --html-path html-path --json-path json-path

config-path.description: Specify the path where your config file is located.
config-path.name: config-path

alias.description: Enter the alias name. You must use either the --alias flag or the --stack-api-key flag.
alias.name: alias

stack-api-key.description: API key of the source stack. You must use either the --stack-api-key flag or the --alias flag.
stack-api-key.name: stack-api-key

content-type.description: Specify the UID of the content type for which you want to migrate HTML RTE content.
content-type.name: content-type

global-field.description: Checks whether the specified UID belongs to a content type or a global field. This flag is set to false by default.
global-field.name: global-field

branch.description: The name of the branch to be used.
branch.name: branch

html-path.description: Enter the path to the HTML RTE whose content you want to migrate.
html-path.name: html-path

json-path.description: Enter the path to the JSON RTE to which you want to migrate the HTML RTE content.
json-path.name: json-path

delay.description: To set the interval time between the migration of HTML RTE to JSON RTE in subsequent entries of a content type. The default value is 1,000 milliseconds.
delay.name: delay

locale.description: The locale from which entries will be migrated.
locale.name: locale

batch-limit.description: Provide batch limit for updating entries (default: 50).
batch-limit.name: batch-limit
